canonical_truth.summary: The grey-brown squirrel returns to the east boundary carrying a hazelnut, posture open — not confrontational. An offer of exchange.
canonical_truth.concrete_outcome: A trade channel opens at the territorial boundary that was previously only a confrontation line.

perception_prompt.noticeable_surface: the grey-brown squirrel at the east boundary, carrying something, angled differently — not the aggressive stillness from yesterday, but waiting

authorial_note.real_world_inspiration: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz completely open — a passage that was confrontation becomes available for commerce
authorial_note.translation_logic: The same animal who set the territorial line by force yesterday returns with a different stance; whether the offer can be read and acted on depends entirely on available attention
authorial_note.restraint_reason: The trade is small and practical — a pine nut for a hazelnut — but the informational content of the hazelnut (from western stores YY hasn't mapped) is the real value; this is not dramatized
